object.script:
--math & input shorthands m,i,o,p = math,input,output,property ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,acos,asin,tan,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.acos, m.asin, m.tan, m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
--Basic Functions function vec(x,y,z) return {x=x or 0,y=y or 0,z=z or 0} end function add(a,b) return vec(a.x+b.x, a.y+b.y, a.z+b.z) end function mult(a,b) return vec(a.x*b.x, a.y*b.y, a.z*b.z) end function multf(a,n) return vec(a.x*n, a.y*n, a.z*n) end function invert(a) return multf(a,-1) end function subt(a,b) return add(a,invert(b)) end function length(a) return m.sqrt(a.x*a.x+a.y*a.y+a.z*a.z) end function divf(a,n) return multf(a,1/n) end function norm(a) return divf(a,length(a)) end function dot(a,b) return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z end function cross(a,b) return vec(a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x) end function project(a,b) return multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b))) end function reject(a,b) return subt(a, multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b)))) end function reflect(a,b,factor) return subt(a, multf(reject(a, b), factor or 2)) end function stoc(hor,ver,d) local d=d or 1 return vec(m.sin(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.cos(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.sin(ver)*d) end
function vecDelta(a,spot) if not vecDeltaTable then vecDeltaTable = {} vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} elseif not vecDeltaTable[spot] then vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} end vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec = subt(a,vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec) vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec = a
return vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec end
function pulse(var,spot) if not pulseTable then pulseTable = {} pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} elseif not pulseTable[spot] then pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} end pulseTable[spot].pulse = var ~= pulseTable[spot].touch and var pulseTable[spot].touch = var return pulseTable[spot].pulse end
--initial variables modes = { [1] = "continualprotect", [2] = "activeprotect", [3] = "off" } modecounter = pgn("System Setting") chafflastpos = vec() chafdecay = 360--ticks for chaff to decay chafflife = 0--counts how long last chaff has existed chaffout = false
--small functions function debuglight(bool) osb(2,bool) end function chaff() osb(1,true);chafflastpos = mypos;chafflife = 0;chaffout = true end function lerp(a,b,t) return a * (1-t) + b * t end -- 0 to 1 function clamp(a,lo,hi) return m.min(m.max(a,lo),hi) end
function onTick()
--inputs mypos = vec(ign(1),ign(2),ign(3)) spd = length(vecDelta(mypos,"spd"))*60--tested this, it is accurate chaffdist = lerp(8,55,clamp(spd,0,20)/20) rwr = igb(1)--may be solid on, may blink
--mode cycling if pulse(igb(2),"cycle") then modecounter = modecounter + 1 if modecounter > 3 then modecounter = 1 end end mode = modes[modecounter]
--output selected mode for i = 1,5 do osb(i,false) end osb(modecounter+1,true)
--main logic loop osb(1,false)--preset to false so chaff function can overwrite it if we should chaff, using this & function for readability if chaffout then chafflife = chafflife + 1 end--if a chaff is in the air, count toward it's decay if chafflife >= chafdecay then--if a chaff has existed for as long as it takes to decay, there isn't a chaff in the air chaffout = false end if mode == "continualprotect" then
if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end elseif mode == "activeprotect" then if rwr then if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end end end end

object.script:
s,i,o,p,m = self,input,output,property,math pgn,pgb,gn,gb,sn,sb = p.getNumber,p.getBool,i.getNumber,i.getBool,o.setNumber,o.setBool abs = m.abs
rpsMin = m.max(pgn("RPS at throttle 0"), 2.1) rpsMax = m.max(pgn("RPS at throttle 1"), rpsMin) mix = pgb("Mixture control") stoP = pgn("Stoichiometry") afrP = pgn("Air-to-Fuel ratio") prot = pgn("Overheat protection") mode = pgb("RPS control") opt = pgb("Optimal mixture at high throttle") auto = not pgb("Autostart if engine stalls")
heat,start,stall,cyl = false,false,false,false t1,t2 = 0,0 rpsOld,stoT,afrT,floS,fuelM = 0,0,0,0,0.0000001
delay = {} for i = 1,5 do delay[i] = {0.0000001, 0.0000001} end
function clamp(x,min,max) return m.max(m.min(x,m.max(max,min)),m.min(min,max)) end
function lerp(min,max,t) local t = clamp(t,0,1) return min*(1-t)+max*t end
function pid(p,i,d) return{p=p,i=i,d=d,error=0,diff=0,integral=0, run=function(s,sp,pv,min,max,maxI,mult,reset) local reset = reset or false local maxI,mult = maxI or max,mult or 1 local error,diff,out error = sp-pv diff = error-s.error out = error*s.p*mult+s.integral+diff*s.d*mult if reset then s.integral = 0 elseif out > min and out < max then s.integral = clamp(s.integral+error*s.i*mult,min,maxI) end return clamp(error*s.p*mult+s.integral+diff*s.d*mult,min,max) end } end
pidEngine = pid(0.1, 0.002, 0)
function onTick() air = gn(1) fuel = gn(2) temp = gn(3) rps = gn(4) con = gn(5) dyn = gn(6) onPulse = gn(7) > 0 and not on on = gn(7) > 0
rpsSp = mode and clamp(con,2.1,60) or lerp(rpsMin, rpsMax, con)
if prot == 0 then rpsSp = lerp(rpsSp, 2.1, (temp-105)/10) elseif prot == 1 then if temp > 110 then heat = true elseif temp < 100 then heat = false end end if not heat and on and rps >= 2 then if air == 0 and fuel == 0 and temp == 0 then cyl = true afr = (dyn >= 12.6 and dyn <= 15) and dyn or afrP airM = pidEngine:run(rpsSp, rps, 0, 1) fuelM = airM*6.88/afr afrT = afr stoT = 0 else cyl = false flo = m.min(fuel/fuelM,0.1) floS = floS+clamp(flo-floS,-0.001,0.001) thr = pidEngine:run(rpsSp, rps, 0, 1, m.max(fuelM,0.1), 0.0015/(floS+0.0015)) air = m.max(air,0.0000001) temp = clamp(temp,0,100) if mix then afr = (dyn >= 12.6 and dyn <= 15) and dyn or afrP sto = (temp+(1400-100*afr))/(3*temp+200) else sto = (dyn >= 0.1 and dyn <= 1) and dyn or stoP end stoOpt = opt and 0.5 or sto airD,fuelD = delay[5][1],delay[5][2]
airM = clamp(-(1000000*thr*fuel*airD*((3*sto-1)*temp+(200*sto-1400)))/(100000000*air*fuelD),0.0001,1) fuelM = clamp(thr,0.0000001,clamp(-(100000000*air*fuelD)/(1000000*fuel*airD*((3*stoOpt-1)*temp+(200*stoOpt-1400))),0.0001,1))
afrT = clamp(air/m.max(fuel,0.0001),0,99) stoT = clamp((temp+(1400-100*afrT))/(3*temp+200),-1,1) end else airM,fuelM,afrT,stoT = 0.0000001,0.0000001,0,0 pidEngine:run(0,0,0,0,0,0,true) end
if rpsOld >= 2 and rps < 2 then stall = true end if auto or onPulse then stall = false end if rps >= 2 then t1,t2 = 0,m.min(t2+1,30) else t1,t2 = m.min(t1+1,60),0 end if on and not stall and t2 < 30 and t1 >= 60 and not heat then start = true elseif not on or heat or t2 >= 30 then start = false end
for i = 5,2,-1 do delay[i] = delay[i-1] end delay[1] = {airM, fuelM} rpsOld = rps
sn(1, airM) sn(2, fuelM) sn(3, rps) sn(4, gn(3)) sn(5, stoT) sn(6, afrT) sn(7, fuel*60)
sb(1, start) sb(2, cyl) end

object.script:
m,i,o,p = math,input,output,property ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,acos,asin,tan,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.acos, m.asin, m.tan, m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
function delta(c,b)if not a then a={}a[b]={oldVar=0,deltaVar=0}elseif not a[b]then a[b]={oldVar=0,deltaVar=0}end;a[b].deltaVar=c-a[b].oldVar;a[b].oldVar=c;return a[b].deltaVar end
integral_prior = 0
kp = pgn("p") ki = pgn("i") kd = pgn("d") iclamp = pgn("i clamp") vclamp = pgn("v clamp") voffset = pgn("3rd person vertical offset") lookhorgain = pgn("horizontal look velocity gain") lookvergain = pgn("vertical look velocity gain") if pgb("Invert horizontal?") then invertx = -1 else invertx = 1 end
function onTick() lookangx = ign(9)*invertx lookangy = ign(10)*4
lookleadx = delta(lookangx,"llx")*lookhorgain lookleady = delta(lookangy,"lly")*lookvergain pivotang = ign(1)
error = ((m.max(m.min(lookangx+lookleadx,0.383),-0.383) - pivotang)%1+1.5)%1-0.5 integral = m.max(m.min(integral_prior+error,iclamp),-iclamp) derivative = delta(error,"deriv")
value_out = kp*error + ki*integral + kd*derivative
integral_prior = integral osn(1,value_out) osn(2,m.max(m.min(lookangy+lookleady+voffset,vclamp),-vclamp)) end
--((x-y)%1+1.5)%1-0.5
--lookvel --lookacc --lookdifferencevelgain --lookdifferenceaccgain --resultdifferencevel

m,i,o,p = math,input,output,property ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,acos,asin,tan,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.acos, m.asin, m.tan, m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
function delta(c,b)if not a then a={}a[b]={oldVar=0,deltaVar=0}elseif not a[b]then a[b]={oldVar=0,deltaVar=0}end;a[b].deltaVar=c-a[b].oldVar;a[b].oldVar=c;return a[b].deltaVar end
integral_prior = 0
kp = pgn("p") ki = pgn("i") kd = pgn("d") iclamp = pgn("i clamp") vclamp = pgn("v clamp") truevoffset = pgn("3rd person vertical offset") lookhorgain = pgn("horizontal look velocity gain") lookvergain = pgn("vertical look velocity gain") if pgb("Invert horizontal?") then invertx = -1 else invertx = 1 end
function onTick() if igb(4) then lookangx = ign(9)*invertx lookangy = ign(10)*4 voffset = truevoffset else lookangx = 0 lookangy = 0 voffset = truevoffset/3 end lookleadx = delta(lookangx,"llx")*lookhorgain lookleady = delta(lookangy,"lly")*lookvergain pivotang = ign(1)
error = ((lookangx+lookleadx - pivotang)%1+1.5)%1-0.5 integral = m.max(m.min(integral_prior+error,iclamp),-iclamp) derivative = delta(error,"deriv")
value_out = kp*error + ki*integral + kd*derivative
integral_prior = integral osn(1,value_out)
osn(2,m.max(m.min(lookangy+lookleady+voffset,vclamp),-vclamp)) end
--((x-y)%1+1.5)%1-0.5
--lookvel --lookacc --lookdifferencevelgain --lookdifferenceaccgain --resultdifferencevel

_,bl,ba,be=e.getNumber,aA.setNumber,e.getBool,aA.setBool bf,bk=aI.getNumber,aI.getBool abs,cos,sin,floor,atan=m.abs,m.cos,m.sin,m.floor,m.atan pi=m.pi K=pi*2 d=aE Y,bi,l,aZ,q,aK,bd,f=d.drawText,d.drawTextBox,d.drawLine,d.drawRect,d.drawRectF,d.drawCircle,d.drawClear,d.setColor function w(g,j,p)return{g=g or 0,j=j or 0,p=p or 0}end function aP(h,t)return w(h.j*t.p-h.p*t.j,h.p*t.g-h.g*t.p,h.g*t.j-h.j*t.g)end function Q(h)return m.sqrt(h.g*h.g+h.j*h.j+h.p*h.p)end function bj(h,t)return m.sqrt((h.g-t.g)^2+(h.j-t.j)^2+(h.p-t.p)^2)end function aM(h,min,max)return m.max(min,m.min(h,max))end function bb(g)return floor(g+.5)end function aC(as,ag,aV,aS)at=-.9*n+50.09 al=I aQ=aV-as aT=aS-ag aO=aQ/at aL=aT/at for e=1,at do if al then l(as+aO*(e-1),ag+aL*(e-1),as+aO*e,ag+aL*e)end al=not al end end aY=13333 o=.03*pi ac=.09*K+o aB=40 H={}B={}ar=I n,G=7,0 J={}for e=1,100 do J[e]=T end function onTick()Z=w(_(1),_(3),_(2))X=-_(27)*K U=-_(20)*K ad=-_(32)*K+pi aw=_(30)>0 aR=aw~=aU and aw aU=aw if aR then ar=not ar end aN=_(31)==1 aF.remove(J,1)aF.insert(J,aN)r=0 for e=1,6 do if J[e]then r=r+1 end end if r>=2 then af=I else af=T end r=0 for e=1,26 do if J[e]then r=r+1 end end if r>=2 then ah=I else ah=T end r=0 for e=1,100 do if J[e]then r=r+1 end end if r>=2 then an=I else an=T end av=w(_(23),_(24),_(25))ay,aJ,aH=_(4),_(5),_(6)am,ai,ak=cos(ay),cos(aJ),cos(aH)az,aj,ao=sin(ay),sin(aJ),sin(aH)aW=w(ai*ak,-aj,ai*ao)aq=w(az*ao+am*aj*ak,am*ai,-az*ak+am*aj*ao)bg=aP(aW,aq)V=_(19)z=w(_(7),_(8),_(9))if Q(z)>0 then B[V]={x=z,C=0}end z=w(_(10),_(11),_(12))if Q(z)>0 then B[V+1]={x=z,C=0}end V=_(21)z=w(_(13),_(14),_(15))b_=w(_(16),_(17),_(18))if Q(z)>0 then H[V]={x=z,ap=b_,C=0}end for s,aX in ax(B)do B[s].C=B[s].C+1 if B[s].C>=aB then B[s]=aG end end for s,aX in ax(H)do H[s].C=H[s].C+1 if H[s].C>=aB then H[s]=aG end end aD=_(29)==1 if aD then R=_(26)else R=0 end if R<.01 and R>-.01 then G=G-G/5 else G=aM((G+R/160),-.1,.1)end if n>=50 then G=0 end n=aM(n+(R/55*n/2.4)+G*n/2.4,.1,50)c=-atan(aq.g,aq.j)+pi L,M=Z.g,Z.j end function onDraw()D,O=d.getWidth(),d.getHeight()if D>32 then if ar then d.setMapColorOcean(0,0,0)d.setMapColorShallows(2,2,2)d.setMapColorLand(7,7,7)d.setMapColorGrass(8,10,8)d.setMapColorSand(6,6,4)d.setMapColorSnow(25,25,26)d.setMapColorRock(3,3,3)d.setMapColorGravel(4,4,4)d.drawMap(L,M,n)end b,a=P(L,M,n,D,O,Z.g,Z.j)S=n/D au=n/50 i=(aY/1000)/S for e=0,2 do ab=5+10*e f(k,k,k,7-au*3)aK(b,a,ab/S)f(k,k,k,11-au*2)Y(b+ab/S-(5*(#tostring(ab))),a,ab)end f(k,k,k,4-au*2)for e=1,8 do l(b,a,b+sin(e*K/8)*120/S,a+cos(e*K/8)*120/S)end f(80,k,0,38)l(b,a,b+sin(X+c-o)*i,a+cos(X+c-o)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(X+c+o)*i,a+cos(X+c+o)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(U+c-o)*i,a+cos(U+c-o)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(U+c+o)*i,a+cos(U+c+o)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(ad+c-o)*i,a+cos(ad+c-o)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(ad+c+o)*i,a+cos(ad+c+o)*i)f(0,k,0,8)aK(b,a,i)l(b,a,b+sin(-ac+c)*i,a+cos(-ac+c)*i)l(b,a,b+sin(ac+c)*i,a+cos(ac+c)*i)f(22,22,22)l(b,a,b+sin(-.97+c)*22,a+cos(-.97+c)*22)l(b,a,b+sin(.97+c)*22,a+cos(.97+c)*22)l(b,a,b+sin(c)*9,a+cos(c)*9)for s,v in ipairs(B)do y,A=P(L,M,n,D,O,v.x.g,v.x.j)u=v.x.p if u<0 then f(240,0,0)else f(80,13,1)u=m.max(m.min(u/500,5),0)l(y-u,A-2,y+u+1,A-2)end aZ(y-1,A-1,2,2)end if Q(av)>0 then y,A=P(L,M,n,D,O,av.g,av.j)f(55,20,40,70)aC(b,a,y,A)f(46,0,25)q(y-2,A-2,1,5)q(y+2,A-2,1,5)q(y,A,1,1)end f(0,40,k)for s,v in ax(H)do F,E=P(L,M,n,D,O,v.x.g,v.x.j)u=v.x.p u=m.max(m.min(u/500,5),0)l(F-u,E-2,F+u+1,E-2)q(F,E-1,1,1)q(F+1,E,1,1)q(F,E+1,1,1)q(F-1,E,1,1)if Q(v.ap)>0 then W,aa=P(L,M,n,D,O,v.ap.g,v.ap.j)f(30,90,k,30)aC(F,E,W,aa)f(40,40,110,30)q(W-2,aa-2,1,5)q(W+2,aa-2,1,5)q(W,aa,1,1)end end if aD then f(1,1,1,200)q(13,2,12,5)f(85,160,35)Y(13,2,"SOI")end else ae="" if af then f(k,0,0)ae="MSSLE" elseif ah then f(239,38,0)ae="TRACK" elseif an then f(k,135,0)ae="WARN" end if af or ah or an then q(0,0,32,32)f(N,N,N)Y(4,12,ae)end if aN then f(N,N,N)Y(6,2,"PING")end end end

-- Author: -- GitHub: <GithubLink> -- Workshop: <WorkshopLink>
W=false ax=true M=ipairs S=table.remove n,t,aC,aE=math,input,output,property d,c,aZ,aY=t.getNumber,aC.setNumber,t.getBool,aC.setBool z,aX=aE.getNumber,aE.getBool cos,sin=n.cos,n.sin pi=n.pi E=pi*2 function f(i,h,g)return{i=i or 0,h=h or 0,g=g or 0}end function x(b,l)return f(b.i+l.i,b.h+l.h,b.g+l.g)end function T(b,aj)return f(b.i*aj,b.h*aj,b.g*aj)end function aR(b)return T(b,-1)end function A(b,l)return x(b,aR(l))end function y(b)return n.sqrt(b.i*b.i+b.h*b.h+b.g*b.g)end function am(b,l)return b.i*l.i+b.h*l.h+b.g*l.g end function aK(b,l)return f(b.h*l.g-b.g*l.h,b.g*l.i-b.i*l.g,b.i*l.h-b.h*l.i)end function ac(aF,aq,U)aQ=aQ or 1 return f(n.sin(aF)*n.cos(aq)*U,n.cos(aF)*n.cos(aq)*U,n.sin(aq)*U)end function aN(b,N,ab,ao)return f(am(N,b),am(ab,b),am(ao,b))end function ag(b,N,ab,ao)return x(x(T(N,b.i),T(ab,b.h)),T(ao,b.g))end af=z("Max friendlies")aB=z("User number")av=z("Frequency seed")B=z("Encryption
